name: Natsuki, but EXPANDED
description:
Today, Natsuki woke up to find that her previously flat, small chest had turned into the most huge pair of boobs she's ever seen. Not quite understanding what happened during the night, she's asking you to help her out. Help her how?? Not even she knows.

Some people seemed to like this weird idea. Me included. And now here it is: pink-haired short tsundere girl, now with boobs.

Art by Detritus / Duvet208

> UNCENSORED IMAGE GALLERY <
creator: forcedattrition
